content.text:
REVIEW-FINDING: 2.1 WARN — App is login-gated (App/LoginView.swift:5 SecureField) but review credentials are placeholders: demo_user.txt = "test", demo_password.txt = "changeme", notes.txt = "TBD" — this may trigger review questions or a 2.1 rejection.
Pierre: Apple rejects builds under 2.1 when reviewers cannot sign in to reach core functionality, and placeholder credentials plus a "TBD" note guarantee they can't. Replace them with a real working demo account and notes that explain the sign-in flow and how to reach key features before submitting.
